description_long: This object consists of a group of five carved pumpkins arranged on a circular, wooden-textured platform. Each pumpkin features a classic jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes, angular noses, and jagged mouths, all carved in a menacing, expressive style. The pumpkins vary in size, with one large pumpkin at the back and four smaller ones in front, creating a clustered, tiered effect. All pumpkins have visible green stems, and their surfaces display a natural orange coloration with subtle ribbing and shading. The carved faces are hollow, suggesting the pumpkins are empty inside, typical of Halloween decorations. The overall appearance is festive and slightly spooky, suitable for seasonal urban displays.
description: A group of five carved jack-o'-lantern pumpkins with expressive faces, arranged on a round wooden platform. The pumpkins vary in size and feature classic Halloween facial carvings.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five pumpkins' carved faces, with the largest pumpkin at the back and four smaller ones in front.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the stems and the side profiles of the pumpkins, with facial carvings partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the pumpkins, with no facial carvings visible and stems prominent.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the side profiles and some facial carvings, with the largest pumpkin on the left.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with expressive, menacing faces featuring triangular eyes, angular noses, and jagged mouths. The carvings are bold and cut through the pumpkin walls, creating hollow facial features.
